surfaces.cards: Solid flat with 1px border-white/10, hover:border-pink-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,127,0.3)] transition-all

hero_bg.description: Abstract glowing lines of yellow and pink on black

gestao_informacao.description: Abstract neon lines forming a futuristic landscape

capital_humano.description: Four professionals in business attire stand together.

premios.description: A vibrant geometric artwork showcasing a cube with gradient colors and abstract lighting.

components.buttons: Rounded-full, bold, bg-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-500 text-white font-bold px-8 py-3 transition-colors
components.badges: Uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs, border border-yellow-400/50 text-yellow-400 bg-yellow-400/10 rounded-full px-3 py-1

sections_instructions.navbar: Sticky at top, crystal glass background, logo on left, 8 navigation links (Home, Competências, Capital Humano, Mapa, Gestão Documental, Gestão da Informação, Iniciativas, Prêmios, Projetos). Must use smooth scrolling to section IDs.
sections_instructions.home_hero: Massive H1 (text-5xl to text-7xl), electric pink accent words. Subtitle in text-xl text-white/60. Primary CTA 'Explore'. Background uses hero_bg with black overlay.
sections_instructions.competencias: Bento Grid Layout. Cards with 1px border, dark background, hovering reveals purple/pink glow. Use Lucide icons. Title 'Nossas Competências'.
sections_instructions.capital_humano: Two-column layout. Left: large image of capital_humano. Right: stats and descriptive text about the team and culture.
sections_instructions.mapa: Full width dark section. Title 'Onde Estamos'. Visual map representation with two distinct points for Belo Horizonte/MG and Contagem/MG. Build an SVG map layout or use lucide map-pin icons positioned relatively on a stylized dark background container to represent the two cities. Add a clear legend (e.g. Yellow pin = BH, Pink pin = Contagem).
sections_instructions.gestao_documental: Feature showcase. Alternating text/image layout or a sleek grid highlighting document tracking, archiving, and digitization.
sections_instructions.gestao_informacao: Use gestao_informacao background image with heavy overlay. Focus on data flow, analytics, and modern information security.
sections_instructions.ultimas_iniciativas: Use a marquee (react-fast-marquee or framer-motion) for initiative tags or a horizontal scroll of initiative cards.
sections_instructions.premios: Dark section with glowing cards. Use premios image for visual flair. Emphasize awards with neon borders.
sections_instructions.projetos_futuros: Timeline layout or floating glassmorphic cards describing upcoming tech upgrades.

testing.data_testid_rules: All links, buttons, and section wrappers MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link', data-testid='hero-explore-button').
